error_signature: iframe sandboxing breaks dynamic HTML responses
title: Iframe sandboxing affects dynamic HTML in webhook responses
symptom: Dynamic applications relying on HTML and JavaScript in webhook responses are broken due to iframe sandboxing introduced in n8n.
root_cause: The introduction of iframe sandboxing in the webhook node response prevents dynamic HTML and JavaScript from executing properly, leading to broken workflows that depend on these features.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_INSECURE_DISABLE_WEBHOOK_IFRAME_SANDBOX to true
Restart n8n to apply the changes
Test the webhook response to ensure it works as expected
agent_instruction: Set the N8N_INSECURE_DISABLE_WEBHOOK_IFRAME_SANDBOX environment variable to true and restart n8n.
safety_notes: This change may impact the security of your n8n instance.
